FBE-RAINBOW_POWER.title: Rainbow
FBE-RAINBOW_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 Orb Slot.
FBE-COOLANT_POWER.title: Coolant
FBE-COOLANT_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Frost[/gold].
FBE-KEEPING_A_HAND_POWER.title: Ace Up the Sleeve
FBE-KEEPING_A_HAND_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of your turn, randomly [gold]Retain[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] cards in your Hand with the highest Energy costs.
FBE-TIME_FALL_POWER.title: Timefall
FBE-TIME_FALL_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to an enemy, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional Doom.
ENRAGE_POWER.description: Whenever you play a Skill, you may gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
ENRAGE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play a Skill, there is a [blue]{Prob}[/blue] chance to gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
ENRAGE_POWER.title: Enrage
FBE-UNLIMITED_BLADE_WORKS_POWER.title: Unlimited Blade Works
FBE-UNLIMITED_BLADE_WORKS_POWER.smartDes: [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] deals [red]1/{Amount}[/red] of its normal damage, but hits [blue]{Amount}-1[/blue] additional times.
FBE-SWORD_SAGE_POWER2.title: Sword Sage
FBE-REPATRIATE_POWER.title: Repatriator
FBE-MASTER_REALITY_POWER.title: Master Reality
FBE-MASTER_REALITY_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you create a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
FBE-DEMON_POWER.title: Demon
FBE-DEMON_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add {Amount} [gold]Demon Forms[/gold] with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
FBE-UNREAL_ENGINE_POWER.title: Unreal Engine
FBE-UNREAL_ENGINE_POWER.smartDescription: All your cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold]. At the start of each turn, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
FBE-GENESIS_POWER2.title: Genesis
FBE-GENESIS_POWER2.smartDescription:
At the start of your turn, gain {Amount}{singleStarIcon}.
At the end of your turn, lose all {singleStarIcon}.
FBE-STATIC_DISCHARGE_POWER.title: Static Discharge
